message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  ArrowColor #222222
  ArrowThickness 1
  MessageAlign left
}
skinparam participant {
  BackgroundColor #A8F04A
  BorderColor #6A8F2A
  FontColor #000000
}
skinparam actor {
  BackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  BorderColor #666666
  FontColor #000000
}

participant "TaskExecutionStrategy" as TES #A8F04A
participant "Action" as ACT #A8F04A
participant "Connection" as CON #E6E6F2
actor "SSH client/server connection" as SSH
actor "ssh daemon (or winrm service)" as DAEMON

TES -> ACT : init(..)
TES -> ACT : init(..)
TES -> ACT : run()

ACT -> CON : put_file()
CON -> SSH : transfer module data
SSH -> DAEMON : transfer module data
activate DAEMON
DAEMON -> DAEMON : save module to disk
deactivate DAEMON
DAEMON --> SSH : transfer complete
SSH --> CON : transfer complete
CON --> ACT : return remote path

ACT -> CON : exec_command()
CON -> SSH : run module remotely
SSH -> DAEMON : run module remotely
activate DAEMON
DAEMON -> DAEMON : execute shell command
deactivate DAEMON
DAEMON --> SSH : return response code, stdout, stderr
SSH --> CON : return response code, stdout, stderr
CON --> ACT : return response code, stdout, stderr
ACT --> TES : return JSON

@enduml
